files.name: general
sample: Mbewu ziyenera kubzalidwa msanga potsatira malangizo kuti zigwirane ndi nyengo yonse ya mvula

Ndi kusapanganika kwa kagwedwe ka mvula, mbewu zobzalidwa mochedwa zimakhala pa chiopsezo chosowa chinyontho panthawi zofunikira monga kuchuluka kwa matenda ndi tizilombo, kuchepa kwa nthawi yokulira komanso kuyamwa michere munthaka
Minda isamalidwe pambuyo pomaliza kukolola pamene dothi lidakali ndi chinyezi ndipo silivuta kulima
Izi zimathandiza kuti khasu lidzilowa kwambiri komanso udzu ndi zotsalira za mbewu ziole bwino ndipo nthaka imatakasuka  ndi kuchepetsa kuthamanga kwa madzi
Ngati izi nzovuta kuchita, alimi ayetsetse kukonza minda pofika kumapeto kwa mwezi wa September ndi cholinga chakuti adzabzale ndi mvula yoyamba
Mitengo ya fetelezayakhala ikukwera kotero kagwiritsidwe ntchito koyenera kamanyowa ndi kothandiza
Pomwe manyowa akugwiritsodwa ntchito pamodzi ndi feleza, mbewu zimakula mwamphamvu. Zokolola zimachuluka komanso zimakhala zabwino
Alangizi a zaulimi akuyenera kupeleka upangiri wa mmene tingaphatikizire zinyalala za mbewu kuti tipange manyowa a mitundu yosiyanasiyana

Udzu umachepetsa michere, chinyezi ndi dzuwa zofika ku mbeu. Udzu umasunganso tizilombo ndi matenda zomwe zimachepetsa zokolola. Pochepetsa kukanganira , nkofunika alimi apalile mbeu zawo nthawi yoyenera komanso pafupipafupi
Nkofunika kuti alimi agwiritse ntchito mbeu zomwe zingamere, kutakasuka ndi kukula mwathanzi
Pobzala mbeu mwakasakaniza, mbeu zopitilira imodzi zikhoza kukololedwa munyengo imodzi pamunda umodzi kotero mlimi amapeza phindu lochuluka
Nthawi zina, phindu lina ndi monga kusunga chinyezi, kupeleka thandizo kumbeu zina, kuwonjezera nthaka/chonde, kuchepetsa kukokoloka kwa nthaka komanso kuthana ndi tizilombo ndi matenda
Kubzala mbeu yamtundu umodzi pamalo amodzimodzi kwa nthawi yayitali kumachepetsa zokolola pokhapokha atangieiritsa njira zina zosamalira mbeu zomwenso ndi zofuna ndalama zochuluka
Mwachitsanzo, kubzala chimanga chokha pamalo amodzi kwa nthawi yayitali kumadzetsa kaufiti. Choncho nkoyenera kuti ogwira ntchito zaulimi athandize alimi ndi ndondomeko zaulimi wakasinthasintha
Tizilombo towononga mbeu komanso matenda zimachepetsa zokolola komanso zimatsitsa maonekedwe a zokolola

Kupezeka kwa tizilombo komanso matenda kungachepetsedwe posagwiritsa ntchito mankhwala  kokha koma mwachitsanzo kutsatira kutha kwa nyengo ta fodya ndi thonje; kuotcha kapena kukwilila zinthu zonse zogwidwa ndi matenda ndi tizilombo komanso kuononga mbeu zina zonse
Kuzula tomato, fodya kapana thonje pakutha pakukolola kumathandiza kuchepetsa kubuka kwa matenda monga mtchemberezandonda
Ndalama zambiri zikhoza kutayika polemba ogwira ntchito komanso kugwira ntchito zambirimbiri nthawi imodzi zomwe zimadzetsa kusalongosoka

Ogwira ntchito zaulimi akuyenera kuthandiza pokhadzikitsa ndondomeko za ulimi mogwirizana ndi alimi ndi cholinga chakuti malo, madzi, mphamvu, nthawi, ndalama komanso zinthu zonse zigwire ntchito moyenera
Ndikukwera kwa zinthu zaulimi, ndikofunika kuonetsetsa kuti ndalama zolowa zikubweretsa phindu labwino; zokolola zapamwamba komanso phindu

Ntchito ya kafukufuku idzetse mitundu ya mbeu zamakono zosiyanasiyana, zopatsa zokolola zambiri komanso zopilira ku tizilombo ndi matenda; kuti mbeu zamakonozo zichite bwino kwambiri, nkofunika kutsatira ndondomemko zoyenera zamalimidwe

Alimi azindikire kuti kuchuluka kwa tizilombo ndi matenda kumachepetsa zokolola ndi maonekedwe a mbeu kotero agwiritse ntchito njira zovomerezeka zothana ndi tizilombo ndi matenda moyenera komanso panthawi yoyenera

Ntchito zachikhalidwe zothandizira kuchepetsa mavuto a tizilombo ku nazale komanso kumunda zilimbikitsidwe ndipo alimi ayenera kugwiritsa ntchito ndondomeko zonse zoyenera zothanirana ndi tizilombo ndi matemba
Ngongole zotengedwa kuti zitukule ulimi ndi zabwino koma alimi ayenera kuthandizidwa ndi alangizi a zaulimi kuwerengera ndalama zofunika asanatenge ngongoleyo
Kuputula kuthekera kochita kasinthasintha, mizere ibzalidwe ndi mbeu zopilira mosiyana ku tizilombo ndi nyengo kuti titeteze mbeu kusachita bwino

Alimi ambiri amavutika kugwira ntchito zakumunda moyenera komanso munthawi yake pogwiritsa ntchito manja ngakhale alembe atchito; kugwiritsa ntchito ziweto komanso zipangizo zokokedwa ndi ziweto monga zogaula, zopanga mizere, zozbalira ndi ngolo zonyamula katundu kumapeputsa ntchito ndipo imagwiridwa mwachangu
Zipangizo zina monga zopopera mankhwala, zobzalira mbeu, ndi wilibala zimathandiza pantchito zakumunda ndipo alimi akhale ndi chidwi chopeza zipangizozi

Ngongole zotengedwa kuti zitukule ulimi ndi zabwino koma alimi ayenera kuthandizidwa ndi alangizi a zaulimi kuwerengera ndalama zofunika asanatenge ngongoleyo;  izi zingawathandize kupanga ziganizo choyenera pa kuchuluka kwa ndalama zongongola komanso kagwiritsidwe ntchito kuti apeze phindu lambiri
Kubzala mbeu zosiyanasiyana kukutanthauza kubzala mbeu zopitilira mtundu umodzi munyengo imodzi kapena chaka chimodzi

Pomwe mbeu zopitilira mtundu umodzi zabzalidwa munyengo imodzi, alimi amachepetsa chiopsezo chosakolola zakudya kapena kusapeza ndalama ngati mbeu zina sidzinachite bwino, ndipo izi zimathandiza kuti mitengo ya zokolola isamasinthesinthe

Kutaha kwa Competence-Based Curriculum (CBC) kutisize muezezo omunca oyemi fa kuituta ka kueza ili kokutahisa kufunda ni koumeka bucaziba ni bukoni bobuzamaelela ni bupilo bwa kacenu; ona ma 21st Century skills.

Buka ye masupanzila a kuluta tuto ya Litilica mwa Silozi ku ba Foomu 1 ibaakanyelizwe kuzamaelela mayemo a Competence Based Curriculum ayemi fa kunyalanisa tuto yefumanwa mwa sikolo ni bupilo bwa zazi ni zazi.

Buka ye iezelizwe kuba sikwatiketo sesikatusa baluti kukona kuluta CBC, ka nako yeo libuka za baluti ni za bana ba sikolo halisalukisiwa. Buka ye isupa buitamo bobutuna bwa likolo la tuto mwa naha kuamana ni kubona kuli musipili wa kuhatiseza curriculum hauna matulungundu amañata. Nihaikuli cwalo, baluti basusuezwa kuekeza ni kuitusisa libuka zeñwi kuya ka lipatisiso zabona kubona kuli habasiyi tima niyekana yekona kusiyala mwa musebezi wa kutoma ni kuluta kuya ka curriculum ye.
Nina ni sepo yetiile kuli baluti bakafumana tuso mwa buka ye.
Ka kufeleleza, nibata kububeka buitamo ni kubeleka ka taata kwa babeleki ba Curriculum Development Center ni kubona kuli buka ye yafela kuñoliwa.
TUTO: LIKANDE ­ LIKA ZEBUPA LIKANDE LA KUBULELA KA MULOMO (STORY - ELEMENTS OF A STORY - ORAL)
TUTO-NYANA 1: TUTO/ MAYEMO A LIKANDE (THEME) ............
TUTO-NYANA 2: KONFULIKITI (CONFLICT) ...............................
TUTO-NYANA: SIMBOLIZIMU (SYMBOLISM) ..............................
TUTO-NYANA 5: MUKANDEKELO (POINT OF VIEW) ...................
TUTO-NYANA 6: MUTOMAHENYEZO WA LIKALULO ZEBUPA LIKANDE (NARRATION TECHNIQUE) ............................
TUTO-NYANA 7: ZEFUMANEHA MWA LIKANDE LAKUIKUPULELA (ELEMENTS OF A STORY IN A COMPOSED STORY) .....................

MWAKUITUSISEZA BUKA YE Litaba zeiputezi mwa buka ye lilukela kulutiwa mwa teemu 3 ya Foomu 1 feela. Buka ye ialuzwi mwa likalulo ze 04. Kalulo ni kalulo ina ni moishulumukela kuyeñwi kuli bana ba sikolo bakone kutomahanya zeiputezi mwateñi. Lituto zeinzi mwa buka mo haki lituto zelukela kulutiwa ka zazi ni zazi. Lituto zemwa buka mo lilukela kuitusiswa ki muluti kubupa milelo ya zelukela kulutiwa mwa lizazi ni lizazi (lesson plans).

Musebezi fokuyemi kuituta ni misebezi yefilwe ni kutomahanywa kuamana ni kuluta sika luli sesilukela kukoniwa haiswaneli kueziwa mwa mulutelo wa lizazi lililiñwi feela. Likona kulutiwa mwa milutelo ya mazazi amañata.
KAKANYO YA MULUTELO
Mulutelo ulukela kulatelela likakanyo zebulezwi mwa syllabus ya Litilica mwa lipueo za Zambia.

Buka ye masupanzila a kuluta Silozi mwa Foomu 1 ibaakanyelizwe kuzamaelela mayemo a Competence Based Curriculum ayemi fa kunyalanisa tuto yefumanwa mwa sikolo ni bupilo bwa zazi ni zazi.
Ninani sepo yetiile kuli baluti bakafumana tuso mwa buka ye.

Buka ye ya masupanzila a kuluta Silozi mwa Foomu 1 ibaakanyelizwe kutusa kutoma ni kuluta curriculum ya silimo sa 2023. Buka ilukiselizwe kutusa kumonyehela baluti ni babanwi mwa nzila ya kutoma ni kuluta zeiputezi mwa curriculum ni kuli mafelelezo lukone kufitisa tuto ya mbuwa yeluta bupilo.

Buitumelo bobutuna buya kwa makolo ni maluko hamoho cwalo ni tutengo twa pilu-tomoha too netutusize kwa kufa zibo ya bucaziba ni masheleni akonisize kuli musebezi wo upetahale. Nibata hape kuitumela kwa baluti bamwa likolo ni likolo zepahami hamoho cwalo banebazwa mwa maluko a likolo la tuto ka musebezi-tuna wa kuñola buka ye.

Nihakuli cwalo, ki tukelo ya muluti kuiketela kalulo yelukelwa kukonomekwa mwa mulutelo ni mulutelo. Kuekeza fateñi, musebezi fokuyemi kuituta ni misebezi yefilwe ni kutomahanywa kuamana ni kuluta sika luli sesilukela kukoniwa haiswaneli kueziwa mwa mulutelo wa lizazi lililiñwi feela. Likona kulutiwa mwa milutelo ya mazazi amañata.

Mulutelo ulukela kulatelela mihato ya Gradual Release Model (GRM) moo muluti alukela kukala pili kubonisa muezezo wa musebezi anosi, kona cwale akaeza ni bana ba sikolo mi sanafelelezo bana ba sikolo baikezeza musebezi ili kubonisa kukona kueza musebezi kwabona.
MUKANGA1: MIINELO NI MITOMO YA NAHA (NATIONAL VALUES) 1. Makalelo  Zeiputezi mwa mukanga:
Mukanga wo uama miinelo ni mitomo ya naha. Mukanga wo ukaitusiswa kuluta likalulo za kubulela ni kuteeleza, kubala ni kuñola.
- baitusise lipulelo zelukile ni zeswanela kuikambota litaba za namungelele (miinelo ni mitomo ya naha).
Liitusiso kwa kuluta ni kuituta: - Caati yebonisa matuku amwa limba, muunda mwa bulozi, licinceho za myaha, milyani ni lika zekola, milyani ya sipatela,
milyani ya sintu, mabotela a macwala, muunda, butuku bwa kolela, butuku bwa kovid, linanga, ...
Musebezi 1: Kuikambota taba yefilwe yeama litabai za namungelele (miinelo ni mutomo wa naha).
Musebezi-nyana (a): kuikambota kuli litaba za namungelele kiñi (miinelo ni mitomo wa naha). Muluti:

- Akenye bana ba sikolo mwa ngambolo ya kutaluhanya kuli kanti litaba za namungelele kiñi ?  Litaba za namungelele ki matata a zieza mwa mikwa yemiñata mi litokwa mikwa yemiñata kufeza butata bo.  Ki matata atiswa ni kuekezwa kilika zeñata mi kubutokwa kuswalisana ni licaziba ze shutana kubufeza.  Litaba za namungelele likona kuba mwa likalulo zepeli. Yapili ki lika zetiswa ki likezo zaluna batu, yabubeli ki lika zetiswa ki miinelo ya lifasi.  Mitala ya litaba za namungelele yetiswa ki batu.
- Alaele bana ba sikolo kueza lipatisiso zekatungunyuna kuli kanti litaba za namungelele kiñi, ni mitala yalitaba za namungelele mwa naha.
- Abonise bana ba sikolo kobakona kufumana likalabo za taba yeamboliwa; libuka za mifuta, makepe a intaneti, mitende, kuikambota ni bo caaziba ba milonganyana ....
- Abeleke ni bana ba sikolo kubupa sikuka ka kuitusisa kwa kubata likalabo. i. Litaba za namungelele ki sikamani? ii. Litaba za naha ki likamani?

Nanchi kwingijisha competence based (CBC) kwa leta lupimpu ne kuwamishako mfunjilo ya bafunda. Kipamo kitala pa lufunjisho kyayukishatu bulongo makatazho eya na mambo aluno lupimpu lwa mfujilo yakatataka kabiji kino kipamo kyanengezha ne kupana byakwingijisha pa kufunjisha pa kuuba amba kulumbuluke bulongo.

Uno buuku ubena kumwesha kwibikishako kwa kipamo kitala pa kufunda mukupeezhezhako bafunjishi mu mfujishilo, kupana lutangijilo kupichila mu mingilo yapanyiwa ne lweseko lwa bafunda alo lwaimena pa kuuba byaketekelwa bulongo. Bino nangwa byonkabyo, bafunjishi batundaikwa kufikizha ino mfunjishilo kupichila mu kupesapesa ne kwingijisha maana akusomba pakuuba amba bakonshe kubikilapo maana akwaabo pa byobya byashalapo pa kimye kyo babena kufunjisha.

Auno buuku wa lutagijilo wanengezhiwa kwesekana na 2023 Competence Based Curriculum Syllabus. Uno buuku wanembwa mukweseka kukwasha bafunjishi kukonsha kufunjisha nangwa kwa kubuula mabuuku aswishiwa. Kabiji mu uno buuku babikamo byakwingijisha, mingilo, lweseko lwa bafunda kwesekana na kipimo ne nkebelo ya bafunda.

Onkao mambo mingilo ne lweseko lwapanyiwa mukweseka kutundaika kwingila ne kulangluka kwazhika mu bafunda kabiji ne kukwatankanya mfunjilo ya bintu byapusana-pusana pa sukuulu. Bafunjishi batundaika kutazha mfunjilo ya bafunda kwesekana na nkebelo ya bafunda kupesapesa, kwingijisha mashinda aitabizhiwa Umovwe kyanema.
Kuno kupeezha bintu kwa mufunjishi kusa kukwashako bafunda kunonkelamo nangwa bafuma mu buzhokoloke bwapusana-pusana.

Bino nangwa byonkabyo, bafunjishi batundaikwa kufikizha ino mfunjishilo kupichila mu kupesapesa ne kwingijisha maana akusomba kabiji ne kubikilapo maana akwabo pa byobya byashalapo pa kimye kyo babena kufunjisha.

Mingilo yanengezhiwa mu uno buuku yafwainwa kufunjishiwa mu temu 1 mu Grade 1. Nanchi uno buuku bamwabanya mu bishina bibiji kabiji mu bino bishina muji bibese byapusana-pusana nobe, kwamba ne kuteleka, kutanga, byambo, nchikameno ne nembelo. Mu kunungapotu, uno buuku kechi ke lufunjisho ine. Mufunjishi watundaikwa kunengezha lufunjisho kufuma mu uno buuku saka akyangye kufunjisha. Monai amba mwatolamo mingilo mu bibese byapusanapusana apa bino mwanemba lufunjisho lwa pajuuba-pajuuba.

Uno buuku wa Fomu1 mu Kikaonde wanengezhiwa mujishinda ja kukumya, mukukebesha kukwasha bafunjishi kufikizha mfunjishilo bulongo mu ino mfunjilo (Curriculum) ya katataka. Auno buuku wa lutangijilo wanengezhiwa kwesekana na buyuke bwa 2023 Competence Based Curriculum Syllabus. Uno buuku wanembewa mukweseka kukwasha bafunjishi kukonsha kufunjisha nangwa kwa kubuula mabuuku. Kabiji mu uno buuku babikamo byakwingijisha, mingilo, lweseko lwa bafunda kwesekana na kipimo ne nkebelo ya bafunda.

Onkao mambo, mingilo ne lweseko lwapanyiwa mukweseka kutundaika kwingila ne kulangluka kwazhika mu bafunda kabiji ne kukwatankanya mfunjilo ya bintu byapusanapusana pa sukuulu. Bafunjishi batundaikwa kufunjisha kwesekana na nkebelo ya bafunda, kupesapesa, kwingijisha mashinda aitabizhiwa umvwe bekimona amba kyakila mukuwama.

Kuno kupeezhako kwa mu mfunjishilo kusa kukwashako bafunda kunonkelamo nangwa bafuma mubuzhokoloke bwapusana-pusana. Nanchi kyamwekana Patoka amba uno buuku usa kukwashako bafunjishi kufunjisha mu ino mfunjilo ya katataka ya kwingijisha buyuke (Competence Based) mu kutundaika bafunda na maana akuyuka ne kwikala na byubilo byawama mu mfunjilo.

sample: Ukwati ndiye adamanga pa 4 October 2015 , ku Feed the Children ku Nyambadwe mumzindawu .

Amene sadakwatire afatse kaye chifukwa ukwati weniweni umachitika kamodzi pamoyo wa munthu mpaka Mulungu adzakulekanitseni . Ndiye akuyenera atsimikizedi za yemwe akufuna amukwatire kapena kuwakwatira , adatero Paul wa mmudzi mwa Luwanje kwa T / A Chikumbu mboma la Mulanje , polangiza omwe akulingalira za banja .
Kamuleni ndi Polisi Palibe Tsikulo nkhani idavuta ndi ya anyamata ena aja adabutsa bwalo la milandu mtaunimu . Adaganiza bwanji anthuwa ? Uku nkugenda kupolisi wamkulu fodya ali mthumba la kumbuyo .
Kukhala mavuto , anthu tsopano aziyenda kuchoka ku Chirimba , Ndirande ndi Chilomoni kupita kuja koonekera ku Chichiri . Yalakwa , adatero Abiti Patuma .

Pa Wenela pasintha zedi ANatchereza Tidakumana ku sukulu ku Chiradzulu Apatu khoswe ali pamkhate koma ndani angaope kuswa mkhate lero ? Ndani lero angaloze kuti uwo ndi mkhate ? Kuuswa basi ! Tisachedwe ndi anyamata olangika ndi zotsatira za mkalabongo . Nkhani idazunguza anthu pa Wenela ndi ya zochitika ku Polisi Palibe , gulu la masiye .

Ndikumva kuti nkhani ikuvuta ndi ya kulimbana pankhani ya Kamuleni Kaduwa komanso Udadili Issa omwe anenetsa kuti libolonje lalowa ku Polisi Palibe kuchokera ku Dizilo Petulo Palibe , adatero Gervazzio , wapamalopo .

Abodza amenewo . Kodi onsewo ndimayesa adali ndi zipani zawo lero akudzetsa mpungwepungwe kwa Adona Hilida . Kodi Kaduwa suja adazunguza Mpando Wamkulu ndi PDM yake ? Nanga uyu Issa sankati tonse ndi Amaravi ? adayankha Abiti Patuma .

Abale anzanga , musandifunse kuti ankatanthauza chiyani chifukwa sindikuuzani . Ndipo mukadziwa mukufuna mutani ? Nthawi yomweyo , Gervazzio adaika nyimbo ya San B komanso Nepman , inde nyimbo imene adaimba uja mnyamata wa ku Chileka .

. Amatigoneka kukada Amatidzutsa kukacha Amatidyetsa tikamva njala Ili ndi pemphero limene lalowerera paliponse pamene kulira ndi njala kwafika pena . Kugona kumsika kuti ugule chimanga , kuotha dzuwa komweko mpaka nthawi ya nkhomaliro opanda chakudya .

Ndimakumbuka tsiku lina titamupanikiza Moya Pete kuti atifotokozere bwino za mmene abweretsere chakudya pano pa Wenela . Mmalo mwake adati : Amalawi tikutukwanana kwambiri pa Facebook . Tikuphana osati masewera kwambiri .
Koma ine ndikuona ngati kuimbanso nyimbo za Michael Jackson kapena Bob Marley nkutaya nthawi . Adaziimba bwino kale , adatero Gervazzio .
Palibe uyo adayankhira nkhani imeneyo chifukwatu maimbidwe ali mmagulu .

Tili pa Wenela chomwecho adatulukira Fula Kasamba . Tonse chimwemwe chidadzala tsaya . Koma abale , kuphwetsana madzi kotereku bwanji ? Walakwanji munthu ? Ndatulukamo motenthamo . Iwe Tade usandilankhule , sindikufunanso kupalamula . Zoona tsiku ngakhale limodzi osabwera kudzandiona ? Ufiti wako udafika pamenepo ? adafunsa Fula .

Mudalinji mchakachi ? Ma alubino aona zakuda Mpotopola ku Joni , Amalawi 3 200 athothedwa Anthu 106 afa ndi madzi osefukira Tili mchaka china , 2015 wapita ndipo talowa 2016 . Lero tikhale tikuunguza zina mwa nkhani zikuluzikulu zomwe zidamera nthenje mchaka changothachi .

Chakwera akwanitse malonjezoHRDC Masankhidwe a nduna autsa mapiri pa chigwa Malonjezo ayamba kuoneka Maalubino aona mbonaona Kwa nthawi yoyamba , dziko lino lidaona zomwe zakhala zikungomveka mmaiko ena . Mchaka cha 2015 taona maalubino akusakidwa ngati nyama . Kuwapha , kuwachotsa ziwalo , komanso kuwagulitsa kumene pokhulupirira kuti ziwalo zawo
zingabweretse chuma .

Mchitidwewu udatenga malo ku Machinga , Balaka , Dedza komanso Mangochi . Nkhaniyi yakhala ikudandaulitsa bungwe lomenyera ufulu wa anthuwa la Association of People with Albinism in Malawi ( Apam ) malinga ndi mkulu wa bungweli , Boniface Massah .

Massah adati zonsezi zakhala zikuchitika chifukwa cha zilango zomwe mabwalo akhala akupereka kwa yemwe wapezeka wolakwa . Mwachitsanzo , mboma la Dedza amayi ena adalamulidwa kukaseweza kundende zaka ziwiri atapezeka olakwa pankhani yofuna kusowetsa alubino , nkhani yomwe idadandaulitsa bungweli .
Mwezi wa March , anthu achialubino pamodzi ndi mabungwe adachita zionetsero mumzinda wa Blantyre pofuna kuonetsa mkwiyo wawo ndi zomwe zakhala zikuchitika .
Mtsogoleri wa dziko lino , Peter Mutharika , adalonjeza kuti athana ndi onse amene apezeke olakwa komabe ngakhale adalankhula motere , anthuwa akhalabe akukhala mobisala mdziko lawo lomwe .

Madzi osefukira , anthu 106 afa pangozi za madzi Pa 19 January chaka changothachi , ngozi idachitika mmaboma 15 mdziko muno pamene madzi a mvula yosakata adasefukira ndipo maboma a Nsanje , Mulanje ndi Chikwawa ndiwo adakhudzidwa kwambiri , komanso maboma ena monga Rumphi ndi Karonga kumpoto .
Ngoziyi idachitika chifukwa cha mvula yomwe idagwa yochuluka mdziko muno kwa sabata ziwiri osalekeza .
Anthu 145 000 adakhudzidwa mmaboma 6 ena adasamutsidwa mmalo mwawo ndi kukasungidwa mmisasa .
Anthu 106 adafa pangoziyi ndipo dera lokula ndi mahekitala 64 000 lidakokoloka . Kutsatira ngoziyi , matenda a kolera adabuka ndipo anthu 423 adakhudzidwa ndi matendawa omwe adapaha anthu 6 .

Mutharika adalengeza kuti dziko lino ndi malo angozi ndipo kotero mabungwe ndi maiko akunja akuyenera kupulumutsa dzikoli kumavutowo . Mawuwa adachititsa kuti mabungwe akunja koma ena a mdziko la Malawi momwemuno ayambe kupereka thandizo losiyanasiyana kwa anthu amene adakhudzidwa .
Mtopola ku Joni , Amalawi athothedwa Nkhani inanso yomwe idakula mchakachi ndi zipolowe zomwe zidabuka mdziko la South Africa kuchitira alendo amaiko ena amene akugwira ntchito mdzikomo .
Maiko adayamba kusamutsa nzika zake mdzikolo chimodzimodzinso dziko la Malawi mu April lidasamutsanso nzika zake 3 200 zomwe zidakhudzidwa ndi mtopolawo .

Mtopolawo udali wachiwiri dziko la South Africa likuchitira alendo amene akudzafuna maganyu mdzikomo . Mu June 2008 , dziko la South Africa lidachitiranso mtopola alendo a mmaiko ena amene akukhala mdzikolo ndipo anthu 60 adaphedwa pamene anthu oposa 600 adavulazidwa .
Lero pamene mwachita bata mdzikomo , Amalawi ambiri akhamukiranso mdzikomo kukafuna maganyu .
Ziwawazo zidayamba pamene mfumu ya Mazulu Gooodwill Zwelethini idakolezera moto ponena kuti nzika za mmaiko ena zibwerere kwawo ati chifukwa zikuwaphangira ntchito .

Numba tuhu uno mukanda vanaukupwisa nakuzamikisa vyuma vyakunangula valongi, milongeshi vatela kuzachisa chinyingi nauhashi wakutanga chavo nakumona ngana ngwavo vali nakuhakilako vyuma vikwaavo vinahase kuzamikisa kutanga chavalongi chikumanyi haze vanamono ngana ngwavo hali liphwata. Kuhakilako nawa, milongeshi vanahase kwalumuna milimo chipwe vyuma navalinga valongi vili mumukanda uno kweseka nakupwa chashikola nashikola vali nakutangilamo valongi.

Vilongeselo vyosena vili mumukanda uno vanavijinyina mukumona ngana ngwavo valongi vali nakulinangula vyuma navalinga namavoko avo anakuzamikisa nawa kujiminyina muvishinganyeka kaha nawa nakumona ngana nge khala chihela chipwe shikola valiho valongi vanahase kulinangula mujila yamwenemwene. Echi kuvwovuwa khana chinemanyinana hakuhana uswa wakutanga nakunganyala chakalikiilamu yakukupuka kuli khala longi chakuzeneka kutala okwo afuma chipwe omu apwa.

Hilufwelelo lwakumona nge mukanda ou navinangwilo vilimo vavimone kulema kupwa vyuma navikafwa milongeshi kunangula valongi chinyingi, uhashi nalilimi lyaLuvale navilinga vyamwenemwene mukulinangula chakukupuka.

Introduction
Rationale for Teaching Literature in Zambian Languages

The significance of Literature in Zambian Languages in the Zambian classroom is to promote literary skills related to communication, creativity and critical thinking. It also serves as a bridge to enable learners appreciate their rich literary traditions, heritage and cultures as they build their personal characters as well as understand other people's characters.
Suggested Teaching Methodology
Time Allocation

The standard period allocation for Literature in Zambian Language has been prescribed in the Zambia Education Curriculum Framework (ZECF) of 2023. The minimum learner-teacher contact time for this subject is 3 hours, 20 minutes per week, translating into five (5) periods. The duration of a single period is 40 minutes.

Quality, life- long education for all which is accessible, inclusive and relevant to individual, national and global needs.

The Lower Primary Education Syllabi has been developed being cognisant of the need to provide a national age-appropriate curriculum for learners at Grade 1 to 3. The syllabi aim to provide quality education that is aligned with the Competence-Based Curriculum and 21st Century Skills. It also aims to impart the knowledge, skills, values and positive attitudes that are aimed at enabling children to live and grow into productive and useful members of their communities and the Zambian society.
The contributing learning areas to this syllabi are; Literacy and Language, Mathematics and Science, and Creative and Technology Studies.

Cross cutting themes and emerging issues such as National Values and Principles, Life Skills and Health Education, Climate Change and Financial Education have been incorporated in the syllabus to ensure that children cultivate a mindset, skills, values and positive attitudes that prepare them to live responsible lives and be protected from life threatening vices.

It is hoped that the content provided in this syllabus will make learning at Lower Primary School level more meaningful and enjoyable as it is highly activity oriented and allow for a smooth transition into the Constructivist way of learning.
Joel Kamoko, (Mr.) Permanent Secretary- Educational Services MINISTRY OF EDUCATION
Charles Ndakala(Dr.) Director- Curriculum Development MINISTRY OF EDUCATION
LOWER PRIMARY SYLLABI

The Lower Primary School Syllabi have been developed by the need to provide a national curriculum. The syllabi aim to provide quality education that is aligned with the Competence-Based Curriculum and 21st Century Skills. It also aims to bring out learner Competences by imparting knowledge, skills, values and positive attitudes that are aimed at enabling children to live and grow into productive and useful members of their communities and the Zambian society.
The syllabi comprise three (3) learning areas namely;
1. Literacy and Language (incorporating English and Zambian Languages as independent subjects) 2. Mathematics and Science 3. Creative and Technology Studies

THE NYANJA PHRASE BOOK David Sani Mwanza & Sitwe Benson Mkandawire
Guide to Nyanja pronunciation
Vowels
The following points are to be noted: (a) There are 5 vowel letters: i, a, e, o and u pronounced approximately as

follows: i as ea in English `heat', but not always long; a between the a in English `hat' and u in English `hut'; e as e in English `bet' or `bed'; o between the o in English `hot' in British Standard English pronunciation and the first element of the pronunciation of the o in the English word `no' in British Standard English pronunciation; u in English u in English `put' but the Zambian u is more `closed' than English u in `put'.

(b) Tone, or pitch, may distinguish two or more different words. For example mtengo `tree' and mtengo `price' are pronounced differently with regard to pitch. However, tone, or pitch, is not indicated in this phrase book. In the absence of video materials, users are advised to listen to native speakers or those who know the language.

(c) Vowel length may also distinguish two or more different words. Vowel length is indicated by doubling the vowel letter, for example aa. Thus in kubola `to rot' and kufula `to dig out' and kufuula `to shout', the uu represents one long u and the other vowels are short.
Semi-vowels

Nyanja has two semi-vowels, written and pronounced like in English. Thus, the y in Nyanja yama `my maternal uncle' is pronounced like the y in English yes. Likewise, the w in Nyanja iwe `yousingular' is pronounced like the w in English we.
Consonants
Nyanja consonant sounds are written as follows: b, bv, bz, c, ch, d, dz, f, g, j, h, j, k, kh, l, m, n, ny, ng', p, ph, pf, s, sh, t, th, ts, v, , z. The following should be noted:

ISHIWI LYANTANSHI

Ukutendeka kwakupilibula nokubomfya ubutantiko bupya ubwa masambililo ayalekomaila pamusambi ukwishiba ifyakubomba imilimo (Competence-Based Curriculum) kubeleleko ukukansha abasambi pakuti beshibishe imilimo iilefwaikwa munkulo iyandakai.
Ubusalo bwa aya masamililo ayapya ayakwishibisha ifyakubomba imilimo yali munshila nangula mulutampulo lwakupilibula nokupakamisha amasambililo ukulosha ku milimo abasambi bafwile ukwishiba.

Iciputulwa ca masambililo cili icayangwa kumafya ayengatumbukamo ilyo lyonse kwaba ukupilibula imipekanishishe yamasambililo. Kanshi cili icaipelesha ukupekanya ifisolobelo ifyakubomfya pakufunda nokusambilila mukutungilila imifundile yabasambi mucaalo conse.
Imitwe yamasambililo, imitwe inoono, nokutendeka ukubomfya iyi nshila yamasabililo ikabila ukukomaila pakwishiba ifyakubomba imilimo iyalekana-lekana elyo nokuipelesha pamaka mumibombele.
Kanshi ndi nesubilo ilyakuti iyi mipekanishishe yamasamambililo ili nokwafwilisha apakalamba ukupitila mukubimbamo abasambi bonse muno caalo ca Zambia.

Ici citabo cilelanga ukuipelesha ukwaba pa ciputulwa ca masambililo pakuti ubu bupilibulo bwa masambililo bube ubwayanguka kuli bakafundisha, ukupitila mukubalangilila bwini-bwino ifyakufunda, ukulondolola mukwanguka imilimo

UMUTWE 1: IFINTU IFISANGWA MUNG'ANDA

Muli uyu mutwe, kafundisha alalanshanya nabasambi bakwe palwakulondolola ifyo ifipe fyamung'anda fyaba. Pakucita ifi, kafundisha alasambilisha abasambi pakumfwa na ukulanda. Alalondolwela abasambi amashiwi ayo abasambi balingile ukubomfya pakulondolola ifintu ifisangwa mung'anda. Uyu mutwe, walalanda pafipe ifya mung'anda ifyapala nga ifipuna, amasupuni, amafoloko elyofye nafyonse ifisangwa mumuputule wakwipikilamo na sitingi-lumu atemwa umuputule wakwishishamo uukalamba.

Muli uyu mutwe, muli na ukulangilila abasambi ifyo bengalanda ifilundwa fyamashiwi ayaanguka ayakulandafye. Ukulundapofye, abasambi balasambilila na ifyakupanga amashiwi yakulandafye ukubomfya ifilundwa fyamashiwi.

MAZU ATACHI Kutachika kwanloñeshelu yayiha yayuma yikutachika kutañishewa mumashikola, yitunakutena mu Chizungu netu Competence Based Curriculum (CBC), mu Lunda netu Yuma Yinakukuhwelelewa atudizi kwilukisha mukutaña kwawu, kunaleti kuhimpika nintañilu yakumwekesha kudiza kwilukisha yuma yamboka yinakukuhwelelewa kudi atudizi, kwesekezha namaana ayaka yamakonu.

Iwu Mukanda Wakulombola Ntañishi hamwakutañishila atudizi akulaku dehi amu Fomu 1 Litilicha wunaloñeshewi kwesekezha nayuma hashindamena Competence Based Curriculum yafwilaña kunuñañesha kutaña hela ntañilu nayuma yayeni yamwekanaña mukuhanda.

Yuma yamboka yinakukuhwelelewa atudizi kwilukisha yinasonekewi mumukanda wa Nloñeshelu yayuma yikutañishewaña mumashikola amunu mu Zambia, Zambia Curriculum Framework mu Chizungu, yamu 2023, yinakundami kuyuma yidi imu mumukanda.
Iwu mukanda wunakufwila kukwasha antañishi wenawa kuzata nyidimu yawu kwesekezha nanloñeshelu ya Competence Based Curriculum, hampinji yikunabuli nyikanda yakuzatisha yetezhewa.
Dichi wunakumwesha kudihana chikupu kwamutayi wanfulumendi weniwu kwakufwila kubula kukolesha nzatilu yawantañishi.

Hela chochu, antañishi anakoleshewi kubombelahu haniyi yuma yinasonekewi muniwu mukanda, kusanda-sanda nakuwana wunsahu nukuzatishahu nzhila zhikwawu zhahachawu nakwila yuma kulonda kumanisha kukala kudi kwezhima kunatweshi kuwanawu munzatilu yanyidimu yawu muniyi nloñeshelu.
Nakuhweleli nami antañishi akuwuzatisha iwu mukanda wakuyikwasha munzhila yayiwahi.
Kelvin Mambwe (Dr.)
Permanent Secretary ­ Educational Services
MINISTRY OF EDUCATION
Charles Ndakala (Dr.) Director - Curriculum Development MINISTRY OF EDUCATION

KULUMBULULA Iwu Mukanda Wakulombola Antañishi amu Fomu 1 Litilicha wunaloñeshewi nukusonekewa nakashinshi kakeni kulonda kuyikwasha kutañisha zhindizilu zhamwidimi da Lunda muniyi nloñeshelu yinahimpewi. Iwu mukanda anawusoneki kwesekezha nantanjikilu yamu 2023, yazhakutañisha atudizi Idimi da Lunda yetezhewa, yemena hakumona neyi atudizi anelukishi kwila yuma yinakukuhwelelewawu kuzata.

Mukanda weniwu wunafwili kukehesha kukala kwafuma hakubula kwanyikanda yakuzatisha yetezhewa nakukwasha nawa antañishi nayuma yayeni yakuzatisha, zhakwila nizha kweseka nachi atudizi zhaloñeshewa kweseka nachipimu chawu muntañilu niyuma yinatweshi kukeñekawu.

Wunu mutayi wanfulumendi, weluka kukala kukwinza nakuhimpa nikutachika nloñeshelu yantañilu yayiha yinemeni hakumona neyi atudizi anelukishi yuma yinakukuhwelelewa mudi wena. Kutonda nloñeshelu ya Competence Based Curriculum (CBC) diku kutachika kwachintampu chakuya kumbidi mukulumbulwisha kushikilamu nakulema kwantañilu.

NZHILA YAKUTAÑISHILAMU YINAFUUKULEWI Mpinji himpinji yiwunakutañisha, watela kuzatisha nukulondela zhinzhila zhakutañishilamu atudizi zhamboka-mboka. Dichi, wunatweshi kuzatisha zhinzhila zhimu hakachi kanizhi:
Kuhema yisela (Role-play).
Kuzata nyidimu yamboka-mboka kuhitila mukuhema yisela (kuhema-hema yisela yamboka/ drama).
Kusanda-sanda nakuwana wunsahu walala hanyitu yansañu yamboka-mboka (Research).
Kutaña kuhitila mukukeña-keña kulonda kuwana wunsahu walala hanyitu yansañu yamboka-mboka (Discovery).
Kutaña kuhitila mukuhanjeka (Discussion).  Kusoneka nsañu zhazhila (Short Stories).  Kutuña zhinsañu, tuyisela nizhakutañisha zhikwawu kuzatisha
